gaps.gap_description: Time-period mismatch: regulation requires 30 but current policy specifies 24.

current_policy.text: KYC review for high-risk customers is performed every 24 months

required_change.requirement_text: Financial institutions must complete enhanced due diligence for all high-risk clients within 30 days of onboarding.
required_change.source_section: Section 2.1 - Enhanced Due Diligence for High-Risk Clients

evidence.source_section: Section 2.1 - Enhanced Due Diligence for High-Risk Clients
evidence.source_quote: Financial institutions must complete enhanced due diligence for all high-risk clients within 30 days of onboarding. Failure to comply will result in penalties of up to EUR 10 million or 10% of annual turnover.

remediation.recommended_action: Update 'POL-001' to change the retention/review period from 24 to 30 as required by Section 2.1 - Enhanced Due Diligence for High-Risk Clients.

gaps.gap_description: Policy exists but semantic alignment with the requirement needs manual verification.

required_change.requirement_text: Institutions must implement real-time transaction monitoring systems capable of flagging suspicious activity within 60 seconds.

evidence.source_quote: Institutions must implement real-time transaction monitoring systems capable of flagging suspicious activity within 60 seconds. Non-compliance sanctions may reach EUR 5 million per breach.

remediation.recommended_action: Perform a manual policy review against the regulatory requirement text.

human_oversight.review_reason: Rule-based fallback could not determine gap with confidence — human review required.

gaps.gap_description: Time-period mismatch: regulation requires 14 but current policy specifies 24.

current_policy.text: KYC review for high-risk customers is performed every 24 months

required_change.requirement_text: Institutions must verify and record beneficial ownership for all corporate clients within 14 days.

evidence.source_quote: Institutions must verify and record beneficial ownership for all corporate clients within 14 days. Violations are subject to enforcement action and licence suspension.

remediation.recommended_action: Update 'POL-001' to change the retention/review period from 24 to 14 as required by Section 4.7 - Beneficial Ownership Verification.

gaps.gap_description: Policy exists but semantic alignment with the requirement needs manual verification.

required_change.requirement_text: Compliance teams must file suspicious activity reports within 24 hours of detection.

evidence.source_quote: Compliance teams must file suspicious activity reports within 24 hours of detection. Breach of this requirement constitutes a regulatory violation liable to fines and remediation orders.

remediation.recommended_action: Perform a manual policy review against the regulatory requirement text.
